cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Integrates the statutory frameworks and operational search criteria of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) directly into a disconnected edge deployment context.

test_prompts: Summarize the explicit statutory penalties and imprisonment parameters for the importation, manufacture, or unlawful possession of cocaine, LSD, or heroin as strictly codified under Sections 11 and 19 of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency Act.

Based strictly on Section 41 of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency Act, what specific statutory powers and constraints govern an authorized officer executing a search, seizure, or arrest without a warrant on suspected buildings or carriers?
